infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: TradeTalk uses FaceID to provide quick and secure access to your account.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TradeTalk needs access to your camera to upload product photos and media.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TradeTalk needs access to your photos to upload product photos and media.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: TradeTalk needs access to save photos and videos to your gallery.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TradeTalk needs access to your microphone to record voice messages in chat.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow TradeTalk to access your photos
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow TradeTalk to save photos to your library.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow TradeTalk to access your photos
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow TradeTalk to access your camera
